relationToApplicantInfo: I have known the applicant for three years in my capacity as Head of Chambers at Temple Court Chambers. I have observed their advocacy work directly in a number of Crown Court proceedings and reviewed their written work on several occasions.
suitabilityReference: The applicant has demonstrated a strong commitment to prosecution work throughout their time at chambers. They approach each case with diligence and show a clear understanding of the responsibilities that come with conducting work on behalf of the CPS.
abilityReference: The applicant handles both advocacy and advisory work competently. Their written advice is clear and well-reasoned, and they present their cases in court with confidence and structure appropriate to the level applied for.
